channel.title: Recipe Ideas from dinnerrecipes.github.io/idea
channel.description: A collection of delicious recipe ideas.

item.title: Effortless Dinner Recipes To Make With Kids
item.description: A vegan Dinner Recipes To Make With Kids that even meat-lovers will enjoy. Packed with flavor and good-for-you ingredients. Get the plant-based recipe here! #veganrecipes #plantbased #veganfood #healthyvegan #whatveganseat

item.title: Simple Ideas Carnivore Beef Jerky Recipe Air Fryer
item.description: Looking for amazing Carnivore Beef Jerky Recipe Air Fryer ideas? This recipe is the perfect answer. Simple, fast, and full of flavor.

item.title: Effortless Beef Plate Ribs Recipe Oven
item.description: The easiest and most flavorful Beef Plate Ribs Recipe Oven you will ever make. Perfect for a busy weeknight! Save this pin for the recipe. #weeknightdinner #30minutemeals #simplefood #goodmoodfood #whattoeat

item.title: Simple Japan Beef Recipe
item.description: The easiest and most flavorful Japan Beef Recipe you will ever make. Perfect for a busy weeknight! Save this pin for the recipe. #weeknightdinner #30minutemeals #simplefood #goodmoodfood #whattoeat

item.title: Heavenly Easy Beef Oxtail Recipe
item.description: This keto-friendly Easy Beef Oxtail Recipe is low in carbs but high in flavor. Sticking to your diet has never been so delicious! Find the recipe on our blog. #ketorecipes #lowcarb #ketodiet #lchf #healthychoices
